arts.ttl: Unai Emery offers explanation for Marcus Rashford improvement
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has put Marcus Rashford's return to form since joining the club on loan down to the player "smiling" and enjoying football again.

arts.ttl: Who will Aston Villa take on in the Champions League semi-finals if they beat PSG?
arts.sum: Who will Aston Villa take on in the Champions League semi-finals if they beat PSG? Aston Villa are on the cusp of a phenomenal achievement as they prepare to take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight (8pm).

arts.ttl: PSG vs Aston Villa LIVE: Champions League updates, latest team news, lineups TV, prediction

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are closely monitoring Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, as they hold a 20 percent sell-on clause and stand to gain financially if the transfer goes through. Newcastle have shown interest in Ekitike as a possible replacement for Alexander Isak. arts.ttl: PSG vs Aston Villa LIVE: Unai Emery’s men take on Ligue 1 winners in Champions League quarter-finals
arts.sum: The French champions knocked out Liverpool in the last round and will be confident of progressing

arts.ttl: Ex-Man United striker Louis Saha gives ruthless verdict on what Marcus Rashford has to change to earn second chance at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford joined Aston Villa on loan in February after effectively being exiled by Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim, and he is slowly finding his feet again under Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: “Figured it out myself” – Aston Villa star knows what’s best for him, uninterested in statistics
arts.sum: Aston Villa midfielder Youri Tielemans has admitted he worked out for himself what his best position was and couldn’t care less about statistics either. arts.ttl: “It should be 3-0 twice” – French journalist talks down giddy fan ahead of Aston Villa match
arts.sum: PSG playing Aston Villa in France is a match which is being hugely anticipated not only by supporters of both teams involved but also by neutrals. arts.ttl: Al-Nassr director hints at Jhon Jáder Durán sale – Part of plan when buying from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Jhon Jáder Durán left Aston Villa in the January transfer window, after being linked with multiple clubs from the previous summer onwards. It looked like the player’s agents were trying to find a lucrative home for the Colombian striker. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will face Aston Villa for a spot in the semifinals. For Emiliano Martínez, who played a key role in Argentina’s victory over France in the 2022 FIFA World Cup final, it will be a return to French soil.
